headline: Teradyne Inc (NASDAQ:TER) Blows Past Q1 Estimates on AI-Driven Demand, But Guidance Tempers Enthusiasm
summary: Teradyne smashed Q1 estimates with record revenue of $1.28B, driven by AI semiconductor test demand, but fell 8.5% after hours as cautious Q2 guidance signaled a sequential slowdown.

headline: Shares of semiconductor companies are trading lower following reports that OpenAI has missed some internal targets for sales and usership, which may erode confidence in future demand. Also, ongoing Middle East tensions are weighing on broader sentiment.

headline: Tech’s ‘New Normal’ Trade Pair: Long Chip Stock, Short Software
